title: leucas nyassae var. villosa
intro: Leucas nyassae var. villosa, also known as the hairy or woolly leucas, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Leucas nyassae var. villosa include its ability to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
